share.title: Share this achievement to the community
share.description: Before publishing this achievement, please select the appropriate language.

confirmation.title: Are you sure you want to continue?
confirmation.description: By continuing, you confirm that the content you are about to publish complies with our Terms of Service.

confirmation.title: Are you sure you want to continue?
confirmation.description: This achievement has been published on the community store. Can you confirm that it still complies with our terms of use?

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.description: You're about to delete this achievement. This action will delete the current progression and the achievement will be deleted from the Community Store (if it was published to it).

success.title: You did it!
success.description: You achievement has been created! Why not check out those of the community?

2.title: Get started with interactions
2.description: Have an average of at least 10 interactions over the 7 days.

3.title: French power 🥖
3.description: Have at least 10% of French-speaking users.

5.title: Old member
5.description: Use Discord Analytics for at least a year.

6.title: Diversified users
6.description: Have users who speak at least 15 different languages.

8.title: In search of popularity
8.description: Have an average of at least 1k interactions over the 7 days.

12.title: Too popular for you
12.description: Have an average of at least 20k interactions over the 7 days.

13.title: Explosion of interactions
13.description: Have an average of at least 50k interactions over the 7 days.

16.title: Oh! That's nice
16.description: Use Discord Analytics for at least a month.

18.title: Votes operation
18.description: Have received at least 20 votes over the 30 days.

empty.title: No achievements
empty.description: No achievements available, create one to get started.
